LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, NANCY HESSOL, DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO BREACH OF CONTRACT AND TORTIOUS INTERFERENCE. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE DISCRIMINATION CLAIM AGAINST HESSOL AS AND INDIVIDUAL. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO UNIVERSITY CALIFORNIA REGENTS AND HESSOL TO PLEAD A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR RETALIATION. PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD DISCRIMINATION AND RETALIATION SEPARATELY AND COMPLY WITH CRC 312 (G). GRANT MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA REGENTS AND WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO HESSOL. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. KEVIN M. MCCARTHY. REPORTER: MITCH LYON, CSR #6840

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, NANCY HESSOL; DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

RULING;NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER.THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING-DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S, NANCY HESSOL'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to Breach of contract and tortious interference.

SUSTAIN without leave to amend as to the discrimination claim against Hessol as and individual.

SUSTAIN with leave to amend as to University California Regents and Hessol to plead a cause of action for retaliation. Plaintiff to plead discrimination and retaliation separately and comply with CRC 312 (g)

GRANT motion to strike punitive damages without leave to amend as to University of California Regents and with leave to amend as to Hessol.Prevailing party to prepare order.(302/KMM/PB)
MITCH LYON # 6840
